# TechRise Africa

> Premium practical tech academy training kids, teens, and young adults in coding, AI, digital marketing, and business across Africa.

TechRise Africa is an emerging premium practical institute built to democratize tech education across the continent. Our maiden Kids Bootcamp 2026 runs as a 1-month intensive incubator for ages 7–18+, capped at 150 students.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Vision, four academy pillars (Coding, AI, Digital Creative, Business), and an overview of the academy.
- [Programs & Admissions](/programs): TechRise Kids Bootcamp 2026 spotlight, age-appropriate tracks, dates, and upcoming program catalog.
- [Register](/register): Two-minute intake form to secure a seat in the August cohort.
- [About](/about): Institutional roadmap, office location in Port Harcourt, contact details, and FAQ.
